title: Chrystelle Chevalier-Gagnon
content:
## Chrystelle Chevalier-Gagnon
People.ContactEmail cchevaliergagnon@mccarthy.ca
- Dalhousie University
- University of Ottawa
With a strong focus on client success, Chrystelle is recognized for her business acumen and her ability to navigate complex matters with practical, results-oriented solutions.
Chrystelle is a partner in McCarthy Tétrault’s Business Law Group. Her practice centres on domestic and cross-border mergers and acquisitions, private equity, joint ventures and complex real estate transactions. She regularly advises U.S., European, and international clients on their investments in Canada, and supports Canadian companies in connection with their expansion abroad, across a wide range of industries.
Chrystelle co-chairs McCarthy Tétrault’s Québec Region Student and Stagiaire Committee, serves as President of the Board of Directors of Vélo-Québec and is a Member of the Consultative Committee of Catapulte Communications. She is fluent in French, English and Spanish.
